task: Go to https://example.com and return the page's H1 heading text.
Go to https://httpbin.org and tell me what the page title is.

Go to https://httpbin.org/links/5/0 and return the URL of the first link.
Go to https://example.com and describe what the page is about in one sentence.
Go to https://httpbin.org/get and tell me what HTTP method was used.
